_doc: Board VIEWS (stabilization step 8, 2026-07-10) — hand-picked row subsets rendered as
eval_master_<view>.csv beside the FULL board (eval_master.csv is never filtered by this
file; it remains the complete/historical record). Rendered automatically at the end of
every compile_eval_results.py run — to change which models are displayed, edit a view's
Row spec = the EXACT row key: {path, cohort, arm, thinking}.
path     : the served checkpoint path as shown in eval_master.csv 'Model Path'
arm      : '' | 'modelobs' | 'selfloop'  ('' = the plain/GT row; GT-obs shares it)
A spec that matches no curated row prints a loud warning at compile time.
View names must not collide with the per-base splits (4b/27b/other).

selected.note: Sandra's current working comparison — STARTER SET seeded 2026-07-10, edit freely.
